meta.title: Chapter 4 — Buyer reviews the ordered product

acceptanceCriteria.outcome: Buyer who placed the order can return to their /orders history and see it
Buyer can submit a 5-star written review on the ordered product
Newly submitted review is visible on the public product page within 30 s
